results.title: Indian football amid FIFA WC: Young gen proves future isn’t all gloomy
results.description: While India watches the FIFA World Cup from the sidelines, two young young are showing the country has the talent to dream bigger.

results.title: World Cup: Memorabilia auction to raise millions for global education
results.description: Football fans and collectors around the world will have the opportunity to own some of the most iconic items from the 2026 FIFA World Cup after FIFA, Christie's and Global Citizen announced a landmark charity auction aimed at raising funds for global education initiatives The post World Cup: Memorabilia auction to raise millions for global education appeared first on The Sun Nigeria .

results.title: Wolves Leave Arokodare Out Of Pre-Season Squad Amid Fiorentina Interest
results.description: Super Eagles striker, Tolu Arokodare, has been left out of Wolverhampton Wanderers’ pre-season training squad, adding further weight to reports that he could be on his way out of Molineux this summer. Transfer expert, Fabrizio Romano, revealed that the Nigerian forward was not included in Wolves’ squad as preparations for the new campaign got underway, with [...] The post Wolves Leave Arokodare Out Of Pre-Season Squad Amid Fiorentina Interest appeared first on Naijaonpoint.com.ng .
